issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for API failures.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment, limiting compatibility with agents that cannot run Node.

scenarios.name: Upload and schedule a tutorial video with a custom thumbnail via the YouTube Data API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used googleapis videos.insert but skipped the private+publishAt scheduling pattern and forgot the separate thumbnails.set call; treatment matched the skill's example with privacyStatus: 'private' + publishAt, categoryId: '28', tags array, and youtube.thumbnails.set keyed off res.data.id.

scenarios.name: Pull last-30-day analytics: top videos by subscribersGained plus traffic source breakdown
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invented metric names and missed the insightTrafficSourceType dimension entirely; treatment used youtubeAnalytics.reports.query with dimensions: 'video' sorted by -views and a second query with dimensions: 'insightTrafficSourceType' exactly as the Analytics block shows.
